synopsis: Shadow of Maul Trade Paperback collecting all issues from Marvel Comic Shadow of Maul miniseries An exciting prequel to the upcoming Disney+ series Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord. Welcome to Janix - a neon-lit, shadow-soaked maze of a planet that lies beyond the Empire's reach. Captain Brander Lawson is doing his best to navigate the law in a lawless territory. He's joined by his partner, a droid nicknamed Two Boots, as they face off against scheming crime bosses while the looming threat of the shadow lord, Maul, grows near!
title: Shadow of Maul
